code: import{io}from'socket.io-client';let socket=null;export const getSocket=()=>socket;export const initSocket=token=>{if(socket)socket.disconnect();socket=io('/',{auth:{token},transports:['websocket'],reconnection:true,reconnectionDelay:1000,reconnectionAttempts:5});return socket;};export const disconnectSocket=()=>{if(socket){socket.disconnect();socket=null;}};
